sections.heading: Education
items: Ph.D. in Mass Communication, Loughborough University, UK (2018)
M.A. in Journalism, National Taiwan University, Taiwan (2008)

sections.heading: Research Areas
sections.content: Dr. Tsai's research sits at the intersection of media sociology, cultural studies, and digital media. Her work investigates new media and civic engagement, the platformisation of communication in everyday life, public service media, and the democratisation of mass culture. She brings critical and qualitative perspectives to understanding how digital platforms reshape public participation and cultural production in contemporary Taiwan.

sections.heading: Courses Taught
items: Advanced Research Methods in Social Sciences (Doctoral)

sections.heading: Selected Publications
items: Articles in New Media & Society on platformisation and civic life
Book chapters in Routledge publications on cultural policy and media studies
Research on public service media and democratic culture in Taiwan
